title: Hilly
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image= |name=Hilly |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|If you ask me, it's the only way.''"
"''I agree, Hilly. Princess Leia's plan is sound.|Hilly and a rebel discuss Princess Leia's proposal to hide the Rebel fleet in the Arbran sun|[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]]}} '''Hilly''' was a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] stationed at [[Haven Base|the base]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Arbra/Legends|Arbra]] shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. The Rebel was part of the strategy meeting of Alliance personnel where [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] proposed to hide the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Alliance fleet]] within the [[chromosphere]] of the [[Arbran]] [[Star/Legends|sun]]. ==Behind the scenes== The character of Hilly was created by [[Marvel Comics]] writer, [[David Michelinie]]. The only mention of Hilly occurs by a Rebel soldier off panel, keeping Hilly's identity and gender in doubt. However, ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' identifies Hilly as a male, disproving a rumor that Hilly was a woman in the comic who agreed with Organa's support of the plan. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 58|''Star Wars'' (1977) 58]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 58}} {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Alliance Military members]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]]
